Empire World · Erbil

Slow mornings,
urban evenings.

Specialty coffee, shakes and shisha in a room built from dark wood, warm brass light and quiet corners — open from 7 AM to midnight, every day.

View the menu Reserve a table
The room

Built for staying a while

Urban Cafe sits at the base of Empire Pearl Towers — a space we shaped around dark walnut, raw concrete and brass pendant light instead of the usual glass-and-white cafe formula. The idea was simple: a place in Erbil where you could just as easily open a laptop at 8 AM as pass a shisha hose at 11 PM.

Behind the counter, our own roast runs the show — an Ethiopia Anasora from Sidamo and a house Gaid blend of Ethiopia, El Salvador and Costa Rica, poured through V60, Chemex, Moka pot or French press for anyone who wants to slow down and watch it happen.

7AM–12AMOpen daily
